title: 30 Plantillas Instagram Editables 2026
short_description: Pack editable para carruseles, promos, testimonios y lanzamientos con estilo actual.

cover.prompt: Cover mockup: iPhone displaying Instagram feed with a stylish grid of 6 posts in dark theme with amber accents, floating slightly rotated, dark studio background, cinematic lighting, product photography style, square.

content_plan.mockup_generation: Generar 30 fondos/mockups cuadrados 1080x1080 con MuAPI flux-dev. La estructura editable se compone despues en Figma/Canva.
guide_chapters: Como duplicar en Canva y Figma
Guia rapida de tipografia y color
